options.name: -help
options.description: Prints out the command usage <cellName> # list of cell name

options.name: -all
options.description: prints all the pin properties, siblings of a cell, the libraries where they are defined, and the voltage.

options.name: -lib
options.description: provide a single library name.The name should internal library name or delay_corner(internal_library_name)

options.name: -pin
options.description: reports the pin properties, such as the pin name, direction, capacitance, max load, max fanout, and fanout load.

options.name: -sibling
options.description: reports sibling cells, the libraries where they are defined, and the voltage.

options.name: -threshold
options.description: reports the input thresholds, output thresholds, and slew thresholds of a cell.
